item.title: ZIPs 1/n
item.description: ZIPs are shit period According to wikipedia : ZIP is an archive file format that supports lossless data compression. A ZIP file may contain one or more files or directories that may have been compressed. Official specification of ZIP format by PKWARE : APPNOTE.TXT ZIPs! They are everywhere. Not only .zip but .xlsx, .docx, .pptx, ODF files, .jar, .apk, python .whl and .egg files, flash files, some .dat files of games, .
